mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.5pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates stronger manufacturing activity that supports corporate margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO-based signals falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth signals robust aggregate demand that drives corporate revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns show no significant correlation with GDPC1 growth rates (Pearson r < 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with low interest rates creates a 'stagflation' risk that depresses equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 270 and FEDFUNDS < 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer spending growth in a monetary tightening environment signals resilient demand that offsets rate hikes, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and RSAFS grows > 1%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth in a low-unemployment environment signals labor market overheating that prompts rate hikes, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive in > 60% of instances where UNRATE < 5% and PAYEMS growth > 200k.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts indicate strong demand for residential construction that boosts related sectors, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for HOUST-based signals falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.
